Summer in Rio blends smooth bossa grooves with mellow lofi beats, capturing the laid-back energy of Brazil’s most iconic city. Born on Rio’s beaches in the late 1950s, bossa nova fused samba rhythms with jazz harmony and soft vocals, a sound both timeless and deeply expressive. This 28-track compilation brings that spirit to life: the first 14 tracks dive into bossa lofi with guitars and syncopated rhythms, while the last 14 ease into warm, expansive summer lofi. From beachside mornings to golden hour evenings, this is summer on loop.

Lofi Girl’s chill beats meet Powfu’s heartfelt storytelling in ‘the life of a lofi boy’. Brought together by a shared love of lofi hip hop, this seven-track journey drifts through love, loss, and life’s quiet moments. The project marks Lofi Girl’s first release with vocals and serves as Powfu’s personal love letter to the genre that first sparked his passion. Layered with soft rainfall, birdsong, and gentle vocals, each track captures a mood, a fleeting moment suspended in time. So brew a warm cup of coffee, press play, and let the life of a lofi boy’s story unfold.

lofi beats. Lofi Girl x Assassin’s Creed Shadows (lofi remix) reimagines the legendary
soundscapes of Assassin’s Creed through a serene, contemplative lens. This special
compilation transports you across time and space, from the candle-lit streets of
Renaissance Italy to the snow-covered rooftops of Feudal Japan. Featuring 20 lofi
remixes inspired by the Original Game Soundtrack, iconic melodies like Ezio’s
Family and The Main Theme are transformed into soothing soundscapes. Whether
you’re plotting your next move or simply seeking solace, these tracks offer a moment
of peace amidst the echoes of the past.

Cold neon lights. Dreamy sounds. Pure, hypnotic visuals. Welcome to the brand new, mesmerising universe of synthwave - unlike one you've seen before, where the future is in the past, and the past in the future. If you’re looking for alternative background music to accompany your work/study/chill sessions, you’ve arrived at the right destination. Hazy resonances, lush synth pads and electronic drums with gated reverb will have you gliding through outer space, mixed with nostalgic reverberations reminiscent of the ‘80's - recharging your energy and creative inspiration upon returning to the present. There are mysterious faces to meet & thrilling stories to be uncovered on the road ahead; but for now, let your thoughts drift to a place of pure focus and relaxation.. 🌌
